plugins.name: ecom-cro
plugins.description: Build a CRO recommendation package end-to-end. Parses a client brief, audits the website (DOM-first via live browser, screenshots only as fallback), generates ICE-scored audience-aligned recommendations grounded in UX heuristics, validates feasibility, then builds an interactive HTML prototype recreating the client's site with per-rec toggles (rec card includes brief / why / as seen on, ordered top-to-bottom by page position) — plus an implementation-tracker XLSX (Recommendation, ICE breakdown, Risk, Status dropdown, Date, Comment). v0.6 drops .pptx output entirely (HTML + XLSX are the only deliverables) and adds detailed rec cards + page-position ordering + the XLSX step. v0.5 added on-demand per-rec text export. v0.4 added reusable widget templates and a popup-copy skill tuned for luxury 45+ audiences. Brand-neutral — asks each user for their own style at runtime.
